历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 10609 → 10598 → 9262 → 9528 → 12910. In 2025, it shifted backward by about 3382 positions compared to 2024, with significantly increased volatility; over the past 3 years, it has cumulatively shifted backward by about 3648 positions, with a 2025 baseline of approximately 12910. The university's enrollment plan in Shaanxi for Physics Category was 104 in 2021, 112 in 2022, 115 in 2023, 110 in 2024, and 120 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 158, an increase of 31.7% compared to 2025, significantly expanding enrollment quotas and easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class; ranked approximately 54th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, fluctuating between 48 and 55 in recent years, overall at an upper-middle 211 level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (unidentified giant biological activity at Nanhu Campus), which may have a slight negative impact on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 98th (average), with low short video exposure. No obvious record of enrollment gaps. Materials Science and Engineering is A, Transportation Engineering is A-, Mechanical Engineering is A-, indicating strong disciplinary strength in materials, transportation, and mechanical fields, which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in this province is approximately 206,500, an increase of 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, and the willingness of Shaanxi examinees to apply across provinces is average. The university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 0.9% (2025), not a major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward trend in 2025 rankings, the large expansion of 31.7% in the 2026 enrollment plan easing competition, the 19.7% increase in local Physics Category examinees intensifying competition, and the somewhat negative reputation, and factoring that the increase in examinees partially offsets the expansion effect, the estimated minimum ranking is approximately 15263, with a range of 14763 to 15763.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 15263, range 14763–15763. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (such as Mechanical Vehicle, Materials A-level discipline) as the main direction, with Tier 1 popular majors (Computer, Electronic Information, Automation) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<14763), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
